provider: HKU Li Ka Shing Faculty of Medicine Bachelor of Pharmacy Syllabuses
note: The official syllabuses apply to candidates admitted under the four-year BPharm curriculum in 2024-25 and thereafter, so they cover the 2026-27 cohort. The Department's current curriculum page and 2026 programme brochure confirm the same four-year integrated professional structure but present themes rather than coded courses. This supplement records all 33 explicitly coded courses in the applicable syllabuses: 24 compulsory BPHM professional-core courses, 6 closed-list Year 4 BPHM electives, and 3 language-enhancement courses. The open Common Core pool is excluded because the syllabuses do not identify a closed coded list. CAES1000 is included as published but is optional for candidates who meet the stated English-language exemption. Students complete any 12 credits from the six Year 4 BPHM electives. Recommended Year is included from the official curriculum tables; no Semester is inferred because neither the applicable syllabuses nor the current curriculum structure assigns individual courses to a Semester.
